services.name: Home Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Seasonal upkeep and preventive repairs to keep your property in top condition year-round.

image.alt: Home maintenance technician at work in Rochester NY

problem: Small issues left unattended — dripping faucets, sticking doors, worn caulk — quietly grow into costly repairs. Most homeowners don't notice until the damage is done.
A single deferred maintenance visit can turn a $50 fix into a $500 problem by next season.
solution: Our technicians handle all routine maintenance in a single scheduled visit, fully stocked and ready. We work through a standard checklist and flag anything that needs attention before it becomes urgent.
benefits: Seasonal inspection included with every visit

services.name: Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: Faucet replacement, fixture installs, leak repairs, and under-sink work done right.

image.alt: Plumber fixing a faucet in Rochester NY

problem: Leaky faucets, slow drains, and running toilets waste water and drive up your utility bills every month they're left unattended.
Minor plumbing issues rarely fix themselves — they typically worsen over time and cause water damage if ignored.
solution: We diagnose and fix plumbing issues on the same visit using quality materials, tested before we leave. No callbacks, no second visits.

services.name: Drywall & Painting
services.shortDescription: Drywall patching, skim coating, texture matching, and paint-ready finish work.

image.alt: Drywall patching and painting in Rochester NY

problem: Holes, cracks, and nail pops in drywall look unprofessional and lower your home's value. Most homeowners put it off because texture matching seems complicated.
A visible patch that doesn't match the surrounding wall is almost as bad as leaving the hole there.
solution: We patch, skim, and texture-match your walls so repairs blend in completely — paint-ready same day. We bring all materials and leave no mess behind.
benefits: All patch sizes — small to large

services.name: Carpentry
services.shortDescription: Door repairs, furniture assembly, shelving installation, and wood repairs.

image.alt: Carpenter working on door repair in Rochester NY

problem: Sticking doors, broken hinges, and sagging shelves are daily frustrations that most homeowners tolerate for far too long.
What feels like a minor inconvenience is often a structural issue that gets worse with every season.
solution: Our carpenters handle door planing, hinge replacement, custom shelving, and furniture assembly in one visit, fully equipped with the right tools for the job.

services.name: Electrical
services.shortDescription: Outlet and switch replacement, light fixture installation, and ceiling fan mounting.

image.alt: Electrician installing a light fixture in Rochester NY

problem: Flickering lights, dead outlets, and outdated fixtures are safety hazards that should not be left unattended.
Most homeowners attempt DIY electrical and create code violations that cost more to fix later.
solution: We handle all minor electrical work safely and to NY code — no oversized jobs, just reliable small-task electrical done right the first time.
benefits: Ceiling fan and light fixture install
GFCI upgrades for kitchens and baths
All work meets NY safety codes

services.name: Flooring
services.shortDescription: Hardwood repair, laminate installation, tile replacement, and vinyl plank fitting.

image.alt: Flooring installation and repair in Rochester NY

problem: Scratched hardwood, cracked tiles, and lifting laminate are eyesores that get worse and harder to match the longer they're left.
A single damaged section spreads — water gets under lifted edges, subfloor softens, and a $200 repair becomes a full room replacement.
solution: We repair and replace flooring sections precisely — matching existing material wherever possible and leaving transitions clean and level.

intro.text: ReliableFix started in 2014 with one goal: Rochester homeowners deserve a handyman service that shows up on time, charges a fair price, and does the job right.

howItWorks.headline: How It Works
howItWorks.subheadline: Getting started is simple. Here's what to expect when you reach out.

steps.title: Request a Quote
steps.description: Call us or fill out the contact form. Tell us what needs fixing and we'll get back to you the same day.

steps.title: Get a Flat-Rate Price
steps.description: We assess the job and give you a clear price before we start — no hidden fees, no surprises when we're done.

steps.title: We Fix It Right
steps.description: Our licensed technicians handle the job start to finish. We clean up and follow up to confirm everything is working.

whyChooseUs.text: We Show Up On Time — Guaranteed

testimonials.name: Shona Jones
testimonials.quote: They mounted our TV, patched two drywall holes, and replaced a bathroom faucet all in one visit. Everything done cleanly and the price matched the quote exactly.

testimonials.name: Chris Johnson
testimonials.quote: Our front door had been sticking for months. They diagnosed the issue, planed the frame, and it closes perfectly now. Quick, professional, and fairly priced.

testimonials.name: Lisa Davis
testimonials.quote: Hired ReliableFix to assemble a full bedroom set and mount shelving in my new apartment. Finished everything in under three hours. Will not bother with DIY again.

originStory: ReliableFix started in 2014 with a single truck and a straightforward promise: show up on time, quote a fair price, and do the job right. Rochester homeowners had grown tired of handymen who wouldn't return calls, quoted hourly and ran long, or sent different people every visit.

Over eleven years, we've grown into a team of licensed, background-checked technicians covering every trade a homeowner needs — maintenance, plumbing, drywall, carpentry, electrical, and flooring. Every job is still quoted flat-rate before we start, and we still answer the phone when you call.
We're locally owned, still operating out of Rochester, and every technician on our team lives and works in Monroe County. That hasn't changed.

storyImage.alt: ReliableFix handyman founder reviewing a job checklist in Rochester NY

team.description: Every ReliableFix technician is licensed, background-checked, and has a minimum of five years of field experience across multiple trades. We don't send apprentices alone — every job is handled by someone who has done it hundreds of times before. We treat your home with respect: shoe covers at the door, protected surfaces, and a full walkthrough when the job is complete.

image.alt: ReliableFix handyman team preparing for a job in Rochester NY

faq.question: What is meant by your flat-rate pricing?
faq.answer: We quote a flat rate before any work begins. The price you're quoted is the price you pay — no hidden fees, no hourly surprises.

faq.question: Are your estimates free and no-obligation?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide free estimates for all standard jobs. You're under no obligation to proceed after receiving a quote.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty for your work?
faq.answer: Yes. All workmanship is backed by a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it at no charge.

faq.question: Is there an emergency or same-day callout fee?
faq.answer: Same-day and urgent appointments are available at standard flat-rate pricing. We do not add emergency surcharges.

faq.question: Are you insured and licensed?
faq.answer: Yes. ReliableFix carries full general liability insurance and all technicians hold the NY Home Improvement Contractor License and are background-checked.

faq.question: Do you supply your own materials?
faq.answer: Yes. We bring all tools and standard materials. For specialty items we'll let you know in advance what you'll need to source.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve Rochester and surrounding Monroe County communities including Irondequoit, Brighton, Webster, Greece, Fairport, Penfield, Pittsford, Victor, Gates, Henrietta, and Chili.

faq.question: How do I book an appointment?
faq.answer: Call us at (585) 331-4721 or use the contact form. We typically confirm within a few hours and offer appointments as soon as the next business day.
